games.name: Baby Taylor Thanksgiving Cooking
games.description: This is an online cooking game for Thanksgiving. You will have the opportunity to go into Taylors house to help them prepare for Thanksgiving. Firstly you will need to go to the supermarket and go shopping for ingredients and items to prepare the decorations. When you get home you will need to make the turkey first, from the ingredients to the baking.
games.instructions: Mouse click or tap to play

games.name: Idle Restaurant Tale
games.description: This is a restaurant management simulation game, start as a street food bar, hire new staff and upgrade machine to earn more money, then open a bigger restaurant! Feature: - Simple and easy to start - Strategically upgrade your restaurants to maximize revenue - Various restaurants and food waiting for you to unlock.There are 11 cities and more than 100 different levels. - There are many game adventure events.
games.instructions: Game control is very simple just tap the machines and foods to complete the game levels

games.name: Kitchen King Rush
games.description: Kitchen King Rush is a fast-paced restaurant game where hungry customers arrive, and it&amp;rsquo;s up to you to serve them delicious meals on time! Cook, plate, and deliver a variety of mouthwatering dishes while managing the kitchen chaos. Keep your customers happy, earn big tips, and upgrade your restaurant to become the ultimate Kitchen King! With vibrant graphics, exciting challenges, and addictive gameplay, this culinary adventure will test your speed and strategy. Available in English and Espa&amp;ntilde;ol, dive into the fun and prove your skills as the best chef in town! &amp;zwj; &amp;iexcl;Juega ahora y convi&amp;eacute;rtete en el rey de la cocina!

games.name: Cook it 3D
games.description: Dive into the colorful and exciting world of match-3! Collect juicy ingredients on a plate to cook unique recipes and surprise everyone with delicious masterpieces. Uncover new ingredients, discover even more delicious recipes and become a master of culinary adventures! Ready for a fun and delicious challenge? Then start right now!
games.instructions: Combine 3 required ingredients on the plate with your mouse or finger to get points Do not add more than 3 products to the plate

games.name: Restaurant Tycoon
games.description: In the Restaurant Tycoon game, your main goal is to become a tycoon, successfully developing your business and increasing the profits of your restaurant empire. The game offers the perfect combination of gameplay and strategic decisions. Relax, enjoy the game and watch your empire flourish. Hire managers who will manage your establishment and earn coins in idle mode. Unlock new levels floors. Constantly improve the levels of managers to reach the top of management. Raise the level of your kitchen for faster and more efficient cooking, as well as invest in modern elevators to meet the needs of your clientele.
games.instructions: The game is controlled by the mouse cursor tap on the screen Hire managers Improve the levels of the elevator the kitchen and the restaurant itself Earn coins Open new floors Going into the game after some time you will get a big reward for i

games.name: THE NUMBER PUZZLE
games.description: Test your brain with the ultimate Sudoku challenge! Enjoy hours of number puzzle fun with this classic Sudoku game, designed for players of all skill levels. Fill the 9&amp;times;9 grid with numbers 1 through 9 so that every row, column, and 3&amp;times;3 box contains each number exactly once. Whether you&amp;rsquo;re a beginner or a Sudoku master, this game sharpens your mind and improves logic skills. Features include: Multiple difficulty levels &amp;ndash; Easy, Medium, Hard, and Expert. Intuitive controls and smooth gameplay. Timer to challenge your speed and accuracy. Undo &amp;amp; hint system to help you solve tricky puzzles.
games.instructions: Mouse Touch Click or tap on a cell to select it then click tap a number to fill it Keyboard Use number keys 1 ndash 9 to fill the selected cell Undo Hint Use on-screen buttons to undo moves or get hints

games.name: magical tic tac toe
games.description: Magical Tic Tac Toe is a fresh and modern version of the classic game! Play against a smart computer with multiple difficulty levels or challenge a friend on the same device. Earn coins, unlock beautiful gradient themes, and enjoy smooth animations with a clean premium UI. Perfect for all ages &amp;mdash; simple to play, fun to master, and fully responsive on mobile &amp;amp; desktop. Can you outsmart the computer?
games.instructions: Mouse Touch Controls bull Tap or click on any square to place X or O bull Use Pause to stop the game anytime bull Press Home to return to the main menu bull Select themes and difficulties using on-screen buttons bull Earn coins automatically

games.name: Ice Cream Toppings
games.description: Ice Cream Toppings is a delightful and fast-paced online game made especially for kids who love sweet challenges! At the top of the screen, you&amp;rsquo;ll see a list of yummy ice cream orders waiting to be completed. Your mission is to match each order perfectly by adding the right toppings and flavors. Test your memory, speed, and creativity in this fun ice cream-making adventure!

games.name: Burger Rush Restaurant
games.description: Welcome to your burger paradise! Dive into the sizzling world of restaurant management where every burger tells a story. Craft mouthwatering creations from a diverse range of ingredients, meeting each customers unique taste buds. Serve fast, combine cleverly, and watch your tiny burger joint grow into the town&amp;rsquo;s favorite spot for delicious burgers. Your burger mastery starts now!
games.instructions: Touch Click the ingredients to make a burger and click the customer to serve it
